objective: Validate the V584 staged Montgomery runtime integration and determine readiness for a future non-production observation period.

findings: Montgomery registry entry exists and is recognized by runtime helpers.
Montgomery remains disabled-staged, non-operational, production disabled, and non-selectable.
Montgomery cannot become active through normalization or window active-county override while disabled.
Liberty remains the active operational default.
Liberty runtime assets remain data-owned Liberty assets.
Montgomery assets remain package-scoped under assets/county-implementation/montgomery/ and are not placed into data/.
Montgomery rows are blocked from Liberty context.
Unknown county rows fail closed and are not treated as active known counties.
Montgomery registry runtimeGateEnabled is bound to the false gate.
Montgomery cannot activate or bypass the gate because operational, productionEnabled, selectable, and productionActivationBlocked remain closed.
No Supabase or migration path changes are part of V585.
Historical reads, history UI, historical API exposure, and consumer-facing history dashboard remain false.
Transportation Intelligence enabled, display, and activation states remain false.
Observation should monitor runtime status invariants, containment checks, protected-boundary audits, changed-path audits, Liberty baseline behavior, and Montgomery gate-bypass attempts.
Observation is not an activation, onboarding, selection, Supabase, migration, historical, DriveTexas, Transportation Intelligence, or data/ asset-promotion event.

finalDetermination: STAGED RUNTIME VALIDATION COMPLETE WITH OBSERVATIONS
